stickyWhatsAppButton.tooltipDesktop: Start with a free day — no commitment needed
stickyWhatsAppButton.preFilledWhatsAppMessage: Hi [Gym Name], I'd like to know more about the free 1-day trial.

specs.animation: none — no pulse, no bounce, no notification badge

languageToggle.developerNote: Toggle must re-render all copy in the selected language — not a redirect to a separate URL.

headlineOptions.optionA: You've Tried Before. This Time, You'll Actually See Results.
headlineOptions.optionB: Chennai's Most Trusted Weight Loss Gym — Real Results in 90 Days.
headlineOptions.optionC: The Best Gym in Chennai for People Who Are Done Starting Over.

heroSection.recommendedHeadline: Option A for above-the-fold emotional resonance. Pair with Option C as the meta title tag for SEO.
heroSection.subHeadline: At [Gym Name], we build a plan around your body, your schedule, and your goal — not a generic routine. Join 1,200+ members in [Neighborhood] who stopped guessing and started seeing real change.

backgroundImage.artDirectionNote: Do not use stock. The hero image must be a real interior shot of [Gym Name] — natural lighting, visible equipment, at least one real member (non-posed). This is a copy-adjacent decision; the image is a trust signal and must match the empathetic tone.
backgroundImage.overlayNote: Use a subtle dark overlay (≤40% opacity) to keep H1 contrast ratio WCAG-compliant.
backgroundImage.altText: Real members training at [Gym Name] gym in [Neighborhood], Chennai

primaryButton.preFilledWhatsAppMessageTask3: Hi, I'd like a free 1-day trial at [Gym Name]

labelOptions.optionC: Book My Free Trial on WhatsApp →

primaryButton.microCopyBelowButton: No joining fee. No commitment. Just show up.
primaryButton.secondaryMicroCopyBelowButton: We reply within 30 minutes during gym hours.
primaryButton.abTestRecommendation: Run Option A (Get My Free 1-Day Trial) against Option C (Book My Free Trial on WhatsApp) in Week 3–4. The word WhatsApp in the button label may increase tap rate for the Tamil Nadu audience where WhatsApp familiarity is near-universal.

trustSignals.eyebrowLabel: WHY 1,200+ PEOPLE IN CHENNAI CHOSE [GYM NAME]

googleReviewsWidget.starLabel: Rated Chennai's Best Gym by the People Who Train Here
googleReviewsWidget.ctaLabel: Read what our members are saying →
googleReviewsWidget.linkBehaviour: Opens GMB profile in new tab — never navigate away from the page
googleReviewsWidget.ariaLabel: Open [Gym Name] Google reviews in a new tab
googleReviewsWidget.errorState: Reviews temporarily unavailable. Search "[Gym Name] reviews" on Google to read them.
googleReviewsWidget.developerNote: Embed the live Google Reviews widget — not a screenshot. A static image of stars has zero credibility. The widget must auto-sync so the review count updates in real time.

establishmentYearBadge.tooltipDesktop: [X] years of training real people in Chennai

memberCountBadge.subLabel: Real people. Real results. Right here in Chennai.
memberCountBadge.ariaLabel: Over 1,200 members have trained at [Gym Name] since [Year]
memberCountBadge.tooltipDesktop: Real members. Real results. Right here in [Neighborhood].

femaleSafetyBadge.subLabel: A safe, welcoming space for every woman in [Neighborhood].
femaleSafetyBadge.note: Recommended addition — captures 35–45% of female enquiries that competitors are systematically losing.

trustSignals.trustBarLayoutNote: Display all three trust elements in a single horizontal trust bar on desktop, and a vertically stacked card row on mobile. This entire section sits directly below the hero fold with no padding gap.

valueProp.headline: Not a Gym That Sells Memberships. A Gym That Delivers Results.

benefitCards.title: A Plan Built Around You — Not a Generic Routine
benefitCards.body: Your trainer builds your first 90-day program in week one — based on your body, your goal, and your schedule. No guesswork. No wasted sessions.
benefitCards.hoverExpandedLine: Your first 90-day program is built on Day 1 — before you pay a rupee.

benefitCards.title: Certified Trainers Who Actually Show Up For You
benefitCards.body: Every trainer at [Gym Name] is certified, named, and accountable to your progress. You will never be handed a routine and left alone on the floor.
benefitCards.hoverExpandedLine: Every trainer at [Gym Name] is certified, named, and personally accountable to your progress.

benefitCards.title: Flexible Timings That Fit a Real Life
benefitCards.body: Early morning. Late evening. Weekends. We designed our schedule around working professionals and busy families — not the other way around.
benefitCards.hoverExpandedLine: Early morning, late evening, weekends — designed around working professionals and families.

femaleFirstBlock.developerNote: This block must visually break from the 3-card grid. Render it as a full-width warm-toned banner — a distinct background colour (soft warm beige or a muted brand colour) with a real photo of female members training, not a stock image. It must feel like a deliberate, dedicated statement — not a footnote.
femaleFirstBlock.headline: A Space Where You Feel Safe, Seen, and Supported.
femaleFirstBlock.body: We have a dedicated women's section, certified female trainers, and timings built around your schedule. No judgment. No uncomfortable stares. Just a clean, focused environment where you can show up and work — at your own pace.
femaleFirstBlock.supportingDetailLine: Zumba · Weight Loss · Yoga · Strength Training — all available with female trainers on request.

ctaButton.preFilledWhatsAppMessage: Hi, I'd like to know more about the women's section at [Gym Name].
ctaButton.belowButtonMicroLine: Female trainers available every morning and evening.

socialProof.eyebrowLabel: REAL MEMBERS. REAL RESULTS. NO FILTERS.
socialProof.headline: 1,200 People in Chennai Started Exactly Where You Are Now.
socialProof.subHeadline: Every photo below is a [Gym Name] member — a real name, a real number, a real result.

elements: Member First Name + Initial (Tamil name, large, above the photo pair)
Result Headline (specific, number-driven, below the photo pair)
Context Line (1 sentence — who they were before, in plain language)
Time Stamp (how long it took — never omit this)

photoCards.name: Divya R.
photoCards.resultHeadline: Lost 14 kg. Went from exhausted to energetic.
photoCards.contextLine: Mother of two, had not exercised in 4 years before joining [Gym Name].
photoCards.beforeImageAltText: Divya R. before beginning her 90-day program at [Gym Name], Chennai
photoCards.afterImageAltText: Divya R. after losing 14kg in 90 days at [Gym Name], [Neighborhood]

photoCards.contextLine: IT professional who had tried and quit three gyms before this one.
photoCards.beforeImageAltText: Karthikeyan M. before beginning his program at [Gym Name], Chennai
photoCards.afterImageAltText: Karthikeyan M. after gaining 8kg of muscle over 16 weeks at [Gym Name], Anna Nagar

photoCards.name: Meenakshi S.
photoCards.resultHeadline: Lost 9 kg. Started with Zumba. Never looked back.
photoCards.contextLine: Homemaker from [Neighborhood] who was nervous to walk into a gym alone.

photoCards.afterImageAltText: Meenakshi S. after losing 9kg in 12 weeks at [Gym Name], [Neighborhood]

videoTestimonialCarousel.introLine: We did not script these. We just pressed record.

videoTestimonialCarousel.developerNote: Display Tamil script natively — do not render as an image. Use Google Fonts: Tamil — Noto Sans Tamil. Below each Tamil line, display the English translation in a lighter font weight and smaller size.

closingCta.closingLine: Your result is waiting. It starts with one free day.

ctaButton.preFilledWhatsAppMessage: Hi, I saw the results on your website and I'd like to try a free day at [Gym Name].
ctaButton.belowButtonMicroLine: Your free day — no card, no form, no commitment.

howItWorks.eyebrowLabel: YOUR FIRST STEP IS SIMPLER THAN YOU THINK
howItWorks.headline: Three Steps Between You and the Best Decision You'll Make This Year.
howItWorks.subHeadline: No forms. No upfront fees. No awkward walk-ins. Just one WhatsApp message — and we handle everything from there.
howItWorks.visualLayoutNote: Render as a horizontal three-column icon timeline on desktop. On mobile, stack vertically with a connecting line or subtle arrow between steps.

steps.title: Send Us One Message on WhatsApp
steps.body: Tap the button below and send us a simple message — we have already written it for you. No long forms, no personal details upfront, no sales call you didn't ask for.
steps.microDetail: We reply within 30 minutes during gym hours. After hours? We reply first thing in the morning — your message will not get lost.
steps.ariaLabel: Step 1: Send one WhatsApp message to [Gym Name]

ctaButton.optionA: Send the Message — It's Already Written →
ctaButton.optionC: Start My Free Day — One Tap →
ctaButton.preFilledWhatsAppMessage: Hi [Gym Name], I'd like to book my free 1-day trial. When can I come in?

steps.title: Come In for a Free Full Day — No Strings Attached
steps.body: We will set up your free 1-day trial at a time that fits your schedule. Walk in, meet your trainer, use the full facility, and decide with complete clarity — not from a brochure, but from real experience.
steps.microDetail: Bring comfortable clothes and a water bottle. That is genuinely all you need.
steps.ariaLabel: Step 2: Come in for a completely free full-day trial

steps.title: Pick the Gym Membership in Chennai That Fits Your Life
steps.body: After your free day, if [Gym Name] feels right — choose the plan that fits your goal and your budget. Monthly. Quarterly. Annual. No pressure to decide on the spot, and no joining fee for the rest of this week.
steps.microDetail: Not sure which plan? Your trainer will walk you through it — in Tamil or English, whichever you prefer.
steps.ariaLabel: Step 3: Choose the gym membership plan that fits your life and budget

reassuranceStrip.developerNote: Full-width horizontal band below the 3-step process, before the section CTA. Soft warm-toned background strip.
reassuranceStrip.stripCopy: No Joining Fee This Week  ·  Free 1-Day Trial — No Card Required  ·  90-Day Results Guarantee or Your Money Back

phrases.ariaLabel: No joining fee this week at [Gym Name]
Free 1-day trial — no payment card required

phrases.text: 90-Day Results Guarantee or Your Money Back
phrases.ariaLabel: 90-day results guarantee — full refund if you don't see visible results

closingCta.closingLine: Your free day is waiting. The first message takes ten seconds.

ctaButton.label: Start With a Free Day →
ctaButton.preFilledWhatsAppMessage: Hi, I'd like to book my free 1-day trial at [Gym Name]. When can I come in?
ctaButton.belowButtonMicroLine: The first message takes ten seconds. Everything after that is ours to handle.

trainerProfiles.eyebrowLabel: THE PEOPLE WHO WILL SHOW UP FOR YOU — EVERY SINGLE DAY
trainerProfiles.headline: You Are Not Joining a Gym. You Are Joining a Team That Already Knows How to Get You There.
trainerProfiles.subHeadline: Every trainer below is certified, named, and personally accountable to your 90-day result — not just to the hours on their shift.
trainerProfiles.trainerGridLayoutNote: 3-column card grid on desktop. 1-column full-width stack on mobile with generous spacing between cards. Each trainer card contains: a real portrait photo, first name + last initial, certification badges, a specialisation tag, an experience line, a personal quote, and an individual Chat with [Name] WhatsApp CTA button.

certificationTooltips.ACE: ACE — American Council on Exercise · Internationally Recognised
certificationTooltips.NSCA: NSCA — National Strength and Conditioning Association

trainers.name: Karthik R.
trainers.certificationLine: ACE Certified · NSCA · 7 Years at [Gym Name]
trainers.specialisationTag: Strength Training · Muscle Building · Beginner Foundations
trainers.personalQuote: I have trained first-timers who were scared to touch a barbell. Six months later, they are teaching others. That journey never gets old for me.

ctaButton.label: Chat with Karthik →
ctaButton.preFilledWhatsAppMessage: Hi Karthik, I saw your profile on the [Gym Name] website. I'm a beginner and I'd like to know more about getting started.

trainers.name: Priya S.
trainers.certificationLine: ISSA Certified · Nutrition Coaching · 5 Years Experience
trainers.specialisationTag: Weight Loss · Zumba · Post-Pregnancy Fitness · Women's Wellness
trainers.personalQuote: Every woman who walks in here nervous about being judged — I was that woman once. I became a trainer so that no one has to figure this out alone.

ctaButton.label: Chat with Priya S. →
ctaButton.preFilledWhatsAppMessage: Hi Priya, I saw your profile on the [Gym Name] website. I'm looking for a female trainer for weight loss. Can we talk?

trainers.name: Dinesh K.
trainers.certificationLine: NSCA Certified · Sports Performance · 4 Years Experience
trainers.specialisationTag: Functional Fitness · Fat Loss · Senior Fitness · Flexibility
trainers.personalQuote: Fitness is not about punishment. It is about building a body that makes your real life easier — every single morning.

ctaButton.label: Chat with Dinesh →
ctaButton.preFilledWhatsAppMessage: Hi Dinesh, I saw your profile on the [Gym Name] website and I'd like to learn more about your training approach.

femaleFirstCalloutBlock.developerNote: Secondary callout block that sits below the main trainer grid. Render in the same warm-toned strip used in Section 3's Female-First block and Section 5's Reassurance Strip. Full width. Generous padding. Photo: Priya S. in a training context with a female member.
femaleFirstCalloutBlock.headline: You Will Never Be the Only Woman in the Room — and You Will Never Train Without Support.
femaleFirstCalloutBlock.body: Our female trainers work dedicated morning and evening slots designed around your schedule. From your first free day to your 90-day result — Priya and the team are with you every step.

ctaButton.optionA: Book a Session with a Female Trainer →
ctaButton.optionB: Start My Free Day With Priya →
ctaButton.preFilledWhatsAppMessage: Hi, I'd like to book a free trial session with a female trainer at [Gym Name]. Can you help me find a good time?
ctaButton.belowButtonMicroLine: Female trainer slots available every morning and evening — including weekends.

philosophyStrip.developerNote: Large quote-style typographic block. Dark background, light text, generous padding. No photo. The contrast from the warm card grid makes this strip stop the scroll on mobile.
philosophyStrip.displayQuote: We do not measure success by the number of sessions you complete. We measure it by whether you feel different — stronger, more confident, more like yourself — 90 days from today.
philosophyStrip.attribution: — The Training Team at [Gym Name], [Neighborhood], Chennai

shareIcon.tooltipDesktop: Share this with someone who needs to read it

ctaButton.belowButtonMicroLine: Tell us your goal. The right trainer will be ready.

pricingTable.eyebrowLabel: TRANSPARENT GYM FEES IN CHENNAI — EXACTLY WHAT YOU PAY, EXACTLY WHAT YOU GET
pricingTable.headline: No Hidden Fees. No Annual Lock-Ins. No Surprises After You Join.
pricingTable.subHeadline: Every plan below includes your first free day, certified trainer access, and our 90-day results guarantee — starting from ₹33 a day.
pricingTable.pricingCardsLayoutNote: 3-column card layout on desktop. Full-width stacked cards on mobile — Basic at top, Elite at bottom. The middle card (Premium) carries a Most Popular badge and a subtly elevated visual treatment.

monthlyAnnualToggle.annualTooltip: Pay once a year. Save more. Cancel if the results don't show — guaranteed.

guaranteeBadgeGlobal.label: 🛡️ 90-Day Money-Back Guarantee
guaranteeBadgeGlobal.tooltipDesktop: Follow the program for 90 days. See visible results — or we refund every rupee. No questions asked.
guaranteeBadgeGlobal.ariaLabel: [Gym Name] guarantees visible results in 90 days or provides a full refund
guaranteeBadgeGlobal.placementNote: Must appear inside every pricing card, directly below the price, before the feature list. It must be impossible to read a price without immediately seeing the guarantee.

ctaButton.belowButtonMicroLine: GST receipt provided. Full accountability, day one.

comparisonAnchorStrip.stripCopy: Not sure which plan fits? Send us a WhatsApp message — we will tell you honestly which one makes sense for your goal and your budget. No upsell.
comparisonAnchorStrip.preFilledWhatsAppMessage: Hi, I've been looking at the [Gym Name] pricing page and I'm not sure which plan makes sense for my goal. Can you help me choose — honestly?
comparisonAnchorStrip.ariaLabel: Ask [Gym Name] which membership plan is right for your goal — no sales pressure

guaranteeBlock.developerNote: Full-width warm-toned panel with a shield icon. Sits directly below the three pricing cards — not in the footer, not in fine print. Must feel like a promise being made in person.
guaranteeBlock.eyebrowLabel: OUR PROMISE TO YOU — IN PLAIN LANGUAGE
guaranteeBlock.headline: Follow the Program for 90 Days. See Visible Results — or We Return Every Rupee.
guaranteeBlock.body: This is not a promotional offer with conditions buried in the terms. If you complete 90 days of your program at [Gym Name] and do not see visible, measurable results — we refund your membership fee in full. No arguments, no process, no questions asked.
guaranteeBlock.supportingLine: Less than 1% of members have ever claimed this guarantee — because the program works. We publish this because we are confident, not because we are cautious.

expandCollapse.collapsedLabel: See exactly how the guarantee works →
expandCollapse.expandedTermsCopy: To claim the guarantee: Complete 90 consecutive days of your program at [Gym Name]. Attend the minimum number of weekly sessions for your plan. Notify us at the 90-day mark that you have not seen visible results. We refund your membership fee within [X] business days — no forms, no committee, no conditions. Less than 1% of members have ever needed to claim this. We publish these terms because we are confident — not cautious.
expandCollapse.ariaLabel: Expand to read the full 90-day guarantee terms in plain language

noJoiningFeeStrip.stripCopy: No joining fee this week at [Gym Name] — for any plan, any duration. Walk in for your free day and your first month starts at the plan price only.
noJoiningFeeStrip.tooltipDesktop: Walk in for your free day and your first month starts at the plan price only. No extra charges.
noJoiningFeeStrip.ariaLabel: [Gym Name] is currently waiving the joining fee for all membership plans this week
noJoiningFeeStrip.developerNote: No countdown timer. A stated time window without a ticking clock feels like a genuine offer rather than a manipulation tactic. The Tamil Nadu audience has been burned by fake countdown timers.

closingCta.closingLine: Your first day is free. Your first month starts at ₹999. Your 90-day result is guaranteed.

ctaButton.label: Claim Your Free Day — No Card Required →
ctaButton.preFilledWhatsAppMessage: Hi, I've seen the pricing at [Gym Name] and I'd like to claim my free 1-day trial before choosing a plan. When can I come in?
ctaButton.belowButtonMicroLine: First day free. First month from ₹999. 90-day result guaranteed.

finalCta.eyebrowLabel: ONE SMALL STEP. NINETY DAYS OF CHANGE.
finalCta.headline: You Have Already Done the Hard Part.
finalCta.subHeadline: Deciding to come in is the only step that is actually yours to take. Everything after that — the plan, the trainer, the program, the result — belongs to us.

primaryWhatsAppCta.developerNote: Largest button on the page. Minimum 56px height. Full-width on mobile. Native WhatsApp green. No competing elements within 40px above or below.

personaReassuranceBlocks.expandedText: Karthik has trained hundreds of beginners who felt exactly as you do right now. Your starting point is not a weakness — it is where every result at [Gym Name] begins.

personaReassuranceBlocks.collapsedText: Coming In Alone? You Won't Feel That Way for Long.
personaReassuranceBlocks.expandedText: Priya S. and our female trainers are here before you arrive and with you every session. You will know at least one name before your first day ends.

personaReassuranceBlocks.collapsedText: Paying for Someone Else? We Take That Seriously.
personaReassuranceBlocks.expandedText: GST receipts, monthly progress reports, and direct trainer updates — we are accountable to you and to the person you are investing in.

googleMapsEmbed.errorState: Map unavailable right now. Our address: [Full Address]. Search us on Google Maps — "[Gym Name] [Neighborhood]"
googleMapsEmbed.neighbourhoodSeoLine: [Gym Name] serves members from across Chennai — including [Neighborhood 1], [Neighborhood 2], [Neighborhood 3], [Neighborhood 4], and [Neighborhood 5]. If you are searching for the best gym in [Neighborhood] — you have found it.

bilingualTranslations.developerNote: Commission accurate Tamil translations — do not use a translation plugin. Use Noto Sans Tamil via Google Fonts.

states.trigger: wa.me link on device without WhatsApp
states.microcopy: WhatsApp isn't installed. Call us instead: [Phone Number]
Opening WhatsApp Web — or scan the QR code to message us from your phone.

contactForm.note: Secondary conversion path for Contact page only. The blueprint explicitly recommends avoiding forms — they drop completion rates by ~70% in the Tamil Nadu market.

fields.label: WhatsApp / Phone Number
fields.placeholder: Your number — we won't spam, ever

fields.label: Your Goal
fields.placeholder: e.g., lose weight, build muscle, get consistent

fields.label: Anything else?
fields.placeholder: Tell us what you're looking for — or leave this blank

submitButton.successState: Sent! We'll be in touch shortly.

validationErrors.message: We'd love to know what to call you — even just a first name works.
Looks like a digit might be missing — double-check your number?
Just the digits work fine — no dashes or spaces needed.
We need your number to reach you — we promise, no spam.
What brings you to [Gym Name]? Even one word helps us prepare.

successPanel.headline: We've Got Your Details — and We're Already Looking Forward to Meeting You.
successPanel.subText: Someone from [Gym Name] will reach out on WhatsApp or by phone within 30 minutes during gym hours. If you sent this after 10PM — we'll reply first thing in the morning. Your message will not get lost.

optionalCta.label: While you wait — watch a member's story →
optionalCta.ariaLabel: Watch a member testimonial video from [Gym Name] while you wait for our response

states.microcopy: Just a moment — loading the next part...
Video unavailable right now. Watch [Name]'s story on our Instagram: @[gymhandle]
[Name] made it to 90 days. You can too. → Get My Free Trial
states.conversionNote: Visitor is at peak emotional engagement when the video ends. This state fires a CTA immediately.

pageLoad.extendedLoadMessage: Taking a little longer than usual. Worth the wait — promise.
pageLoad.renderNote: Not a full-screen spinner — a thin progress bar at the top of the viewport plus a single line of text.

notFoundPage.headline: This Page Took a Wrong Turn. Your Fitness Journey Doesn't Have To.
notFoundPage.subText: The page you were looking for has moved or doesn't exist. But [Gym Name] does — and your free 1-day trial is still waiting.

secondaryCta.label: Chat With Us on WhatsApp →
secondaryCta.preFilledWhatsAppMessage: Hi [Gym Name], I landed on a broken page on your website and couldn't find what I was looking for. Can you help?

progressiveCtaArchitecture.preFilledMessage: Hi, I'd like a free 1-day trial at [Gym Name]
Hi, I saw the results on your website and I'd like to try a free day at [Gym Name].
Hi, I'd like to book my free 1-day trial at [Gym Name]. When can I come in?
Hi, I saw the trainer profiles on your website and I'd like to find the right trainer for my goal. Can you help me?

progressiveCtaArchitecture.ctaLabel: Claim Your Free Day — No Card Required →
progressiveCtaArchitecture.preFilledMessage: Hi, I've seen the pricing at [Gym Name] and I'd like to claim my free 1-day trial before choosing a plan. When can I come in?
